title: Allele
summary: An alternative version of a gene. Diploid cells carry two alleles per gene (one on each homologous chromosome); they may be the same (terms/homozygous|homozygous) or different (terms/heterozygous|heterozygous). Alleles can be terms/dominant|dominant (effect appears in heterozygotes) or terms/recessive|recessive (effect masked when a dominant is present).
